boot.title: PETANQUE MASTER
tips: Hold TAB to see the ball ranking.
The Lob stops the ball dead. Perfect near the Jack!
The Iron Shot moves opponent balls, but requires precision.
Rolling keeps rolling further but is more predictable.
The Tournament of Four: 3 matches, 4 legends of the court.
A Carreau is when your ball lands exactly where the other one was.
Pétanque was born in La Ciotat in 1907. "Pieds tanqués": play with feet anchored to the ground.
The Fanny: losing 13-0 without scoring a single point. Tradition is merciless.
On sand, balls stop quickly. Put a bit more power into your throw!
The Docks walls bounce balls back. Watch out for unexpected rebounds!
The Hill slopes. Compensate your throws upward to stay on target.
The best pointers often aim at a mark on the ground, not the Jack itself.
Each court has its own ambient soundtrack. Listen to the court come alive.
A well-executed Iron Shot can achieve a Carreau: the ball takes the exact place of the opponent's.

title.subtitle: The best bowler in the district — that's you!

tutorial.aim: Swipe down to aim, release to throw!
tutorial.aim_sub: The further you pull, the faster the ball goes.
tutorial.score_main:
Every ball closer to the Jack
than the opponent's best = 1 point!
tutorial.score_sub: First to 13 points wins the game.
tutorial.turn_rule: The team furthest from the Jack always plays next.
tutorial.turn_rule_sub: You're winning? It's the opponent's turn!

shop.controls_hint: Arrows Navigate     Enter Buy     1-3 Tabs     Esc Back

terrain_hints.colline: ⛰️ Watch out: this court slopes! Balls roll downhill.
terrain_hints.docks: 🧱 Metal edges bounce balls back. Use the rebounds!
terrain_hints.plage: 🏖️ Sand slows balls quickly. Throw with more power!
terrain_hints.parc: 🌿 Mixed zones: grass (slow) and gravel (fast). Aim strategically.
